explanation: The user requests to first empty the sinkbasin, which means removing all objects currently inside it and cleaning it. The sinkbasin currently contains spraybottle_0 and peppershaker_0. I will pick up and place both of these objects on the countertop. Then, I will pick up the mug_0 (which is dirty and currently on the sink) and place it in the sinkbasin to clean it. After turning the faucet on and off to drain the sink, I will pick up the mug again to continue with the rest of the old plan. The 'CONTINUE_NA' step ensures that all not-attempted steps in the old plan are executed after cleaning.
